name: beats-vscode
description: Workspace heartbeats for the Beats time-tracking daemon — improves Flow Score accuracy by telling the daemon which git repo you're editing.

beats.enabled.description: Send workspace heartbeats to the local Beats daemon.

beats.daemonPort.description: Local TCP port the Beats daemon listens on for editor heartbeats.

beats.heartbeatIntervalSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) to send a heartbeat. Heartbeats are skipped while VS Code is not focused.

beats.privacy.sendBranch.description: Include the current git branch name in the heartbeat. Disable to suppress branch names while still reporting the workspace path.
